title: Verse
description: Universal JSON Schema for a single verse, line, stanza, or unit of sacred text in the ART ecosystem.

id.description: Unique global semantic identifier, e.g. hinduism:upanishads:katha:1.1.1

externalId.description: Sequential 1-indexed integer ID within the text file

religion.description: Canonical name of the religious tradition

collection.description: Collection or canon grouping, e.g. Principal Upanishads, Tripitaka

book.description: Name of the scripture or book

canto.description: Canto or major book division if applicable

chapter.description: Chapter, Valli, Surah, or major section number

section.description: Sub-section or paragraph grouping if applicable

verse.description: Verse or mantra number within chapter

subVerse.description: Line or stanza identifier within the verse

citation.description: Human-readable standard citation string, e.g. '1.1.1' or '24:35'

language.description: Language of the text text, e.g. Sanskrit, Arabic, Hebrew, English

script.description: Script or orthography, e.g. Devanagari, IAST, Arabic, Latin

license.description: License applicable to this verse text

source.description: Digital source archive or print edition attribution

translator.description: Translator name if this is a translated edition

edition.description: Specific recension or critical edition name

crossReferences.description: List of related verse IDs or citations
